treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Started as a continuous intravenous drip for DVT
treatment_information.treatment_response: Stopped after ultrasound revealed no blood clot

treatment_timeline.event: Patient started to experience symptoms (abdominal pain, weakness, labored breathing, pre-syncope)
Patient admitted to ED with initial vital signs recorded
EKG showed Afib/RVR with heart rate as high as 120s
Bilateral lower extremity ultrasound revealed occlusive right greater saphenous vein thrombus
Heparin gtt started for suspected DVT
Ultrasound repeated and revealed no blood clot, heparin stopped
Patient discharged with instructions to avoid standing up too rapidly and stay hydrated

patient_outcome.final_status: Patient returned to normal heart rhythm and was stable at discharge
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with primary care doctor as indicated
